title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Club Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Club Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Club Mahindra in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Club Mahindra:
Club Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Club Mahindra!
